fields.name: Table Name
fields.tooltip: Contains the name of the table to which the comment applies.

fields.name: IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: Specifies the IC partner code that the transactionis sent to or from.

fields.name: Line No.
fields.tooltip:
Specifies the line number for the comment.
When you create a comment for an IC document, a line number is automatically entered number in the Line No. field to keep track of all the comments in the Comment table. The line number is specific to the particular comment.

fields.name: Date
fields.tooltip: Specifies the date the comment was created.

fields.name: Transaction Source
fields.tooltip:
Specifies which company created the transaction.
The field has two options. The following table describes the two options.


Option


Description


Rejected

The transaction was rejected by the IC partner.


Created

The transaction was created and sent from the IC partner.

fields.name: Created By IC Partner Code
fields.tooltip: The IC Partner Code of the company that created the comment.
